compiled_state.title: As a developer, hierarchy enforcement behavior is documented in the ticket CLI reference and CLAUDE.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
Update docs to reflect hierarchy-aware dependency enforcement added in stories S1–S4.

Done Definitions:
- [ ] ticket-cli-reference.md updated with: promotion rules (cross-story → story-story, cross-epic → epic-epic), rejection rules (redundant direct parent-child, circular), and --dry-run flag behavior
- [ ] CLAUDE.md ticket system section updated with a note that `ticket link` enforces hierarchy and rejects circular/redundant deps
- [ ] Doc examples show correct before/after: task→task across stories promoted to story→story; ticket→parent-epic rejected with error message
- [ ] All existing doc references to `ticket link` are consistent with the new behavior

Considerations:
- Depends on S1–S4 being complete so actual error messages and CLI output can be quoted accurately
- Do not duplicate content between cli-reference and CLAUDE.md; CLAUDE.md should summarize and point to cli-reference

comments.body: AUDIT(70fd-a27f): Checked files for invalid ticket link relations. Files checked: plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/prompts/ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md, plugins/dso/agents/ui-designer.md, plugins/dso/agents/red-team-reviewer.md, plugins/dso/docs/ticket-cli-reference.md, plugins/dso/docs/SUB-AGENT-BOUNDARIES.md, plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-link.sh, plugins/dso/skills/dryrun/SKILL.md, plugins/dso/skills/debug-everything/SKILL.md, plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md, plugins/dso/skills/roadmap/SKILL.md, plugins/dso/skills/shared/workflows/epic-scrutiny-pipeline.md, plugins/dso/skills/interface-contracts/SKILL.md, plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md, plugins/dso/skills/tickets-health/SKILL.md, plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/SKILL.md, CLAUDE.md. Files fixed: plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/prompts/ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md (child_of → relates_to on line 301). All other files used only valid relations: blocks, depends_on, relates_to.
comments.author: Test
